details.reason: No active cluster found. Pass --cluster-id to force this scenario.

routing.match_reason: Direct session_id provided and project/Claude session health checks passed.

details.answer_preview: The key rule: when `claude_consult` returns a `SESSION_UPDATE_JSON` with `"error"` or when the answer signals `NOT IN CONTEXT`, the parent agent must not escalate to a direct Claude call in the same session — it should continue without retry and log the decision. Shadow eval data is fire-and-forget and never blocks the caller.
